description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, rectangular layout and a flat roof. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with large windows distributed along the front and sides, allowing for ample natural light. A small porch area is visible at the main entrance, flanked by a row of evenly spaced trees and a paved sidewalk. The property includes a driveway and a detached garage or secondary structure set back from the main building. The landscaping is minimal, with a neat arrangement of trees and a clean, open yard. The overall design is contemporary, emphasizing simplicity and functionality.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a small porch, and minimal landscaping featuring a row of trees and a detached garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, and a row of trees along the sidewalk.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the flat roof, window arrangement, and the spatial relationship between the bungalow and detached garage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, the driveway, and the detached garage with surrounding trees.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the length of the bungalow, the flat roof, and the alignment of trees along the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
